# Agent Commerce Guard

Canonical LLM-readable launch page:
https://fxjim.github.io/agent-commerce-guard/llms.txt

Paid x402 policy evaluator:
POST https://agent-commerce-guard.vercel.app/api/x402-evaluate

Paid x402 package download:
GET https://agent-commerce-guard.vercel.app/api/x402-download

Well-known x402 discovery mirror:
https://fxjim.github.io/agent-commerce-guard/.well-known/x402

The Base Launch Pass costs 1 USDC on Base mainnet. Receiver: 0xc356556Bc6025aA3536df188BD72A5F4E0fE214f. USDC contract: 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913. Chain ID: 8453.
